Field.Label: Enable debug logging
Field.Description: Log all incoming Z-Wave bytes and cmd dict keys to Indigo log. Use this when first testing a new device.

Field.Label: Log unknown command classes
Field.Description: Store hex bytes of any unrecognised report in the rawLastReport state and write to Indigo log.

Field.Label: Temperature unit
Field.Description: All temperature reports are converted to this unit before storing, regardless of what the sensor reports.

Field.Label: Enable stale device detection
Field.Description: Log a warning and mark deviceOnline=False if a device has not reported within the threshold below.

Field.Label: Stale threshold
Field.Description: How long without any report before a device is considered offline. Battery devices report infrequently — allow extra margin.
